feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BTP global account glass break user
entry.content:
We have setup several users for managing BTP. We have integrated our identity provider to authenticate our users.

At the moment we are not clear how to handle the situation when we will lose our identity system for authentication. How can we protect ourselves best in such a situation (we thought of adding a technical emergency / glass break user) to the BTP as admin.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FI-CA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice, but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards.

Till

PS: Copied this question from Tech to subject group, as not replied for long.

Original Question: API details needed for posting payment advice thro... - SAP Community

entry.title: How can I use @impl flag with typescript in cap?
entry.content:
I am currently developing a cap application with typescript. My project structure looks as follows: 

  • srv
    • Controllers
      • bookshop.ts
    • Definitions
      • bookshop.cds

We used the structure like this since we have a lot of different definitions for different applications and want it to be as readable as possible. 

Since the contorllers are in a different folder, we use the @impl annotation to get the right controller. As an example: 

service bookshopService @(path: '/bookshop', impl: './../Controllers/bookshop.ts') {
...
}

Since we use typescript we also use cds-ts to test our application locally. Locally everything works fine. 

However now when we try to deploy our application we get the error, that the bookshop.ts file cannot be found. This also makes sense since we compile all typescript files into javascript files before deploying. So for the application to find the right files the impl annotation would need to be "./../Controllers/bookshop.js" and not ts. 

However when we change it to js, we cannot test it locally without building it for js beforehand. 

Is there a good solution for this problem using CAP? For example is it possible to change the behavior of the compiled Definitions?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: How to connect with "Microsoft Power Apps" or "Microsoft Dataverse" using "SAP Open Connectors"
entry.content:
Hello
As the title suggests, I would like to know how to connect to "Microsoft Power Apps" or "Microsoft Dataverse" using "SAP Open Connectors", a feature of "SAP Integration Suite".

If you look at the "SAP Open Connectors" catalog, you will see "Microsoft Office 365" and "Microsoft Dynamics 365", etc., but can you connect using these?

As an example of usage...
I want to create something that will allow "SAP Integration Suite" to retrieve the information that is sent when a button in "Microsoft Power Apps" is pressed.

I would appreciate it if anyone with knowledge or experience with implementation could tell me.

Best Regards.
Yuya

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachments - data not updated in hana cloud db
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments in sap cap. I am following the below tutorial

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/my-journey-towards-using-ui5-uploadset-with-cap-backend/ba-p/13499427

As per the tutorial, i can able to post and get the attachments. 

when i test i can able to see the data locally as shown below. but i want to see the data in hana cloud db.

Seeing data locally

Connect to local sqlite db

Why this is connecting to sqlite db by default even i have hana cloud db.

Do we need to specify the hana db here?

Please help.

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: PostgreSQL Storage cost
entry.content:
Hello,

In the cost estimator for PostgreSQL , storage metrics : the cost is per 5gb blocks.

So when we estimate a 100GB expected size, we would calculate 20blocks.

But when we analyze the costs of this application in the cockpit, only 1 block for storage is found to be consumed. 

How is this calculated ? Can you please help understand how this storage is actually calculated ?

Thank you

entry.title: Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI?
entry.content:
Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI, but unsure where to begin?

Navigating the complex landscape of innovation can be daunting. It's not just about embracing the latest trends; it's about ensuring that innovation aligns with the needs of your people, is economically viable, and technically feasible. Adding AI into the mix further complicates the equation, as the possibilities it offers are both vast and sometimes overwhelming.

You might find yourself asking, "How can I find the right balance between these factors, including the integration of AI, to create tangible value?"

While there are numerous approaches to this question, our stand-out solution is:

SAP AppHaus’ Human-Centred Approach to Innovation, coupled with its Generative AI Explore Workshop.

Why focus on human-centred design? Often, the most effective way to improve processes is to start by understanding the needs and pain points of the people who actually perform the work. While it may seem intuitive to prioritize certain aspects of innovation, it's only through engaging with end-users that you can truly identify where innovation is most needed.

But where to begin? How do other people and organizations tackle this innovation pressure? This is where thought leaders come into play—individuals who possess the expertise, insights, and innovative ideas to guide you in the right direction.

On March 13, 2024, you’ll have the opportunity to hear from Andreas Hauser, Senior Vice President and Head of the SAP AppHaus Network. With a wealth of experience in orchestrating innovation projects worldwide run by the global SAP AppHaus Network teams, Andreas collaborates closely with experts across diverse fields, gaining insights which he uses to enrich projects with customers.

Join and listen to Andreas share his invaluable insights, and actively engage in dialogue. Post your questions, share your perspectives, and glean insights from a diverse community of innovators.

By the end of the session, you'll emerge with a deeper understanding of today's opportunities, armed with strategies for leveraging SAP's Business AI with SAP Business Technology Platform, in conjunction with the SAP AppHaus Network to propel your innovation journey forward. You will get actionable insights, practical tips, and exclusive access to valuable resources that will empower you to navigate the ever-evolving landscape of innovation with confidence.

Join us here: https://www.youtube.com/live/D_QVQviszaM?si=R0un6RZCOWI-3R5M

Add to calendar: https://url.sap/uxogi7 

We look forward to seeing you!!

entry.title: Re: How to Use Fiori Element App in User task in BTP work...
entry.content:
Hi @appu24 

thank you for asking the question, we have the same requirement.

 

@Archana  / @Ivan-Mirisola:

Unfortunately, the tutorials do not describe how to integrate an existing Fiori Elements app.
They only show how to generate/design a UI5 "form".

Is it possible to integrate a Fiori Elements app as a workflow step/task?
If yes, is there an example/a tutorial?

Kind regards,
Alexander

entry.title: Getting Internal Server Error While post and Update In SAP CAP After Deployment
entry.content:
The SAP CAP app is working absolutely fine in the local environment and once i  deployed that into BTP after that Read and Delete working fine but Post and Update is not working at all it is throwing Internal Server error. Please find teh screenshot below for reference. 

 

Kindly help me to resolve the issue.

entry.title: Metering of SAP BTP GenAI offerings
entry.content:
Hi,

I was reading about the new GenAI offerings on BTP to understand their capabilities and metering. I came across a statement in the standard documentation which I could not understand.

The last paragraph states - "A GenAI token corresponds to a block of 1000 tokens from the LLM service provider."

Does this statement mean that 1 token of SAP BTP GenAI hub is equivalent to 1,000 tokens from the Azure OpenAI service? And so 1,000 BTP GenAI tokens will contain 1,000,000 tokens from Azure Open AI service?

Can someone please confirm if I am reading it right.

entry.title: Difference between MTA.yaml file and Manifest.yaml file
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Please help me to understand the difference between MTA Yaml file and Manifest Yaml file in BTP App Development. And Which one to use in which cases. 

Thanks

Avik

entry.title: Sap task center S4hana Tasks PO Items not showing
entry.content:
Dears ,

I have configured Sap Task Center with S4hana onpremis successfully and all tasks retrived on task center web app , but i have an issue related to sap mobile start app when Display the PO Approval Tasks it only display one or two items from the list of items added in thePO as shown on the attached ,

i tried search task center Blogs and mobile start Articles to check the issue with no luck to find a solution , Any Help i will appreciate .

Regards, 
Mohamed

entry.title: How to access configuration files in SAP Cloud Logging Service
entry.content:
Hi,

I can't find a way to edit the various OpenSearch configuration files for the Cloud Logging Service instantiated in SAP BTP, does anyone know how to do this?

Example configuration file:
　opensearch.yml
　opensearch_dashboards.yml
　Audit.yml

PS:
　I have confirmed that we can edit via API from Dev Tools.
　However, there are some settings that cannot be changed via the API. (e.g. Audit log storage types)
　Is there any other way to edit the file directly?

Best Regards,

entry.title: How to collect logs of various BTP services with SAP Cloud Logging Service
entry.content:
Hi,

I have successfully checked the logs of bound applications in the SAP Cloud Logging Service, but I don't know how to collect the logs of other services in the BTP.

For example, is it possible to collect and check SAP HANA Cloud logs in CLS?
I thought Audit Logs might be the answer, but I could only see how to configure it, not how to check the logs.
If anyone knows how to do this, please let me know.

Best Regards,

entry.title: SAP BTP Updates take some time to reflect?
entry.content:
Dear All,

We've noticed that updates made to settings in the subaccount, such as service instances or service keys, are not being reflected immediately. Could you please clarify the expected time lag for these changes to take effect? Additionally, is there any documentation available regarding this issue?

entry.title: Custom chart is not displaying data in SAP UI Integration chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to SAP build work zone advanced edition and UI integration card. I created UI integration card to displays data from the SAP gateway system, so I created destination and consumed that destination in manifest.json and define content as well. But when I preview UI integration card in BAS, it is not showing any data and I don't see any errors in the network tab. Below is the manifest.json code. Kindly help me if I missing anything.

{
    "_version": "1.14.0",
    "sap.app": {
        "id": "ns.uicard",
        "type": "card",
        "title": "Workflow History UI card",
        "subTitle": "",
        "applicationVersion": {
            "version": "1.0.0"
        }
    },
    "sap.ui": {
        "technology": "UI5",
        "deviceTypes": {"desktop": true, "phone": true, "tablet": true},
        "icons": {
            "icon": "sap-icon://list"
        }
    },
    "sap.card": {
        "type": "List",
         "configuration":{
                   "destinations":{
                      "FD1":{
                         "name": "Workflow_Dest",
                         "defaultUrl":"/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/"
                      }
                   }
         },
         "data":{
              "request":{
                "url":"{{destinations.FD1}}/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/ZUI5_COMMONSet",
                "withCredentials": "true"
              },
              "path":"/d/results"
         },
        "designtime":"dt/configuration",
        "header": {
            "title": "Workflow History",
            "subTitle": "All type of Workflow history",
            "icon": {
                "src": "sap-icon://desktop-mobile"
            }
        },
        "content": {
            "item":{
                "title": "{EmpName}",
                "description": "{WiText}"
            },
            "maxItems" : 5
    }
},
    "sap.platform.mobilecards": {
        "compatible": true
    }
}

Thanks & Regards,

Devi

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition  SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform , @ronaldlee @Divya_Tiwari

entry.title: Principal Propogation, Event Mesh setup and User Context in CAP Nodejs application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a landscape with SAP S4 on premise system  -> Connected to a Event Mesh service on BTP -> and a CAP NodeJS based application which is the consumer of the event received from S4 .

There is a principal propagation in place between BTP and S4.

When an event is raised from S4 , it reaches to the Message client in Event Mesh service on BTP. The CAP Nodejs based application is subscribed to the queue/topic of the same. It immediately receives the event and starts handling it in an event handler.

Now, during the processing within CAPM, it makes oData calls to the backend S4 via Principle Propagation and fetch some more data.

When running locally ( BAS ), this works fine because we have a user context available and that helps in making the connection with S4 via Principle Propagation.

However, If the app is deployed on the space, then even though the event is received successfully, the application cannot make calls to the backend because there is no user context available.

How can we make this work? We can pass the User Id via the event payload but how can we create/get a context out of a simple user id and pass it in the header while making oData calls ?

Please advice.

Br

Nilesh

entry.title: Destinations are working in BAS but not in Build Work Zone, advanced edition
entry.content:
Hey experts,

I am quite new to the whole SAP world. Currently I am trying to retrieve data from a destination using a SAP UI5 integration card. For this reason, I have created a destination in our BTP Cockpit following this tutorial.

After checking that everything was working fine (got 200 ok on 'Check Connection'), I created a UI integration card of type list in Business Application Studio and consumed the destination. 

 

{
    "_version": "1.14.0",
    "sap.app": {
        "id": "ns.directDeploymentTest",
        "type": "card",
        "title": "Destination test",
        "subTitle": "Test card for testing Destinations",
        "applicationVersion": {
            "version": "1.0.34"
        }
    },
    "sap.ui": {
        "technology": "UI5",
        "deviceTypes": {
            "desktop": true,
            "phone": true,
            "tablet": true
        },
        "icons": {
            "icon": "sap-icon://list"
        }
    },
    "sap.card": {
        "extension": "/dataExtension",
        "type": "List",
        "designtime": "dt/configuration",
        "configuration": {
            "parameters": {
                "cases": {
                    "value": "Adresse"
                }
            },
            "destinations": {
                "test": {
                    "name": "test"
                }
            }
        },
        "header": {
            "title": "{version}",
            "subTitle": "Version",
            "icon": {
                "src": "sap-icon://desktop-mobile"
            },
            "data": {
                "extension": {
                    "method": "headerData"
                },
                "path": "/"
            }
        },
        "content": {
            "item": {
                "title": "{{parameters.cases}}: {ShipAddress}",
                "description": "{ShipCity}, {ShipCountry}",
                "info": {
                    "value": "{= format.dateTime(${OrderDate}, {relative:true}) }"
                }
            },
            "maxItems": 5
        },
        "data": {
            "request": {
                "url": "{{destinations.test}}/v4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/Orders",
                "method": "GET"
            },
            "path": "/value"
        },
        "footer": {
            "actionsStrip": [
                {
                    "text": "Refresh",
                    "buttonType": "Emphasized",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "Submit"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                {
                    "type": "ToolbarSpacer"
                }
            ]
        }
    },
    "sap.platform.mobilecards": {
        "compatible": false
    }
}

 

Again, everything worked fine and I got a nice preview showing all the data.

When I use the card in the workzone, the problem starts. When I use the card in my workspace, I get the message "No items available". What is even more strange is the fact that the response "200 OK" is displayed in the network tab for the corresponding request. The response body is some HTML code that I can't do anything with.

 

<html>
    <head>
        <link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7"/>
        <script>
            document.cookie = "fragmentAfterLogin=" + encodeURIComponent(location.hash) + ";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            document.cookie = "locationAfterLogin=" + encodeURIComponent(location.href.split('#')[0].split(location.host)[1]) + ";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            document.cookie = "signature=bjMqGSOEnOEj9ETqBLXC%2FZgOlB4%3D;path=/;Secure;SameSite=None;";
            location = "https://our-workzone-instance/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-workzone-rt-approuter!t3664&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Four-workzone-instance%2Flogin%2Fcallback%3FauthType%3Dxsuaa&state=a1239c50-397e-4274-b4fc-7f4c35d7d402"
        </script>
    </head>
</html>

 

Can any of you please give me a clue as to what I am doing wrong? I have tried different destinations but the overall picture does not change.

 

Thanks a lot for your time and effort.

 

Christian

entry.title: Using an OData API get records back to back in a single page by clicking a button in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using an OData API which is carrying around 1000 of records, we are calling first 20 records through pagination in data variable, is there any way to call the rest of the data in a form of 20 records in a repetitive manner on the same page by configuring a button in SAP Build Apps.

Thanks in advance,
Yashmin

@Dan_Wroblewski , @marihirvi , @StephanKoenig , @Ian_Thain , @SandipAgarwalla

entry.title: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation?

I know that premium version is needed. 

If yes, how can I enhance the DOX SDK.

 

Thanks !

Tillbtp
